originalTitle: Separate the Cord from the Device
content:
Notice how your printer's power cable can be detached from the printer. 

Notice that you can remove the power cable from your computer — be it a laptop or a desktop or a tower.

Why shouldn't this same modular principle be applied across the board to everything electrical?

Why should I have to fuss and fool around with keeping the cord out of my way when I clean my microwave or toaster oven?

For that matter, coffee bean grinders and kitchen mixers etc.

Why should I have to reach behind all the stuff on my kitchen counter to unplug these appliances when it would be so much easier to detach their power cables?

Not really sure Joe, but perhaps it has to do with, planned obsolescence... ;) https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Planned_obsolescence

They would get lost. And manufacturers would start sending the cord without the actual PLUG, as they do now with electronics, so you'd be playing hide and seek to find the cord AND a brick to connect to the outlet.

antares FWIW I think you have a good idea, Joe. Yeah, it has inconveniences associated with it, but the current implementation has inconveniences, too. You pays your money, you takes your choice. If you have a choice.

The extra cost of an additional plug and socket is not negligible. OTOH, I like being able to buy or make a very short or extra long power cord.

https://www.sunbeam.ca/en_CA/kitchen-appliances/sunbeam-1.7l-detachable-cord-electric-kettle-white/BVSBKT31CD-033.html#

Most appliances in Europe use IEC C7 cable, and the replacement cables are dirt cheap.
chineseContent:
请注意如何从打印机上拆下打印机的电源线。 

请注意，您可以从计算机上拔下电源线 - 无论是笔记本电脑、台式机还是塔式计算机。

为什么不应该将同样的模块化原理全面应用于所有电气领域？

当我清洁微波炉或烤箱时，为什么我必须大惊小怪，不让电源线妨碍我？

就此而言，咖啡豆研磨机和厨房搅拌机等。

为什么我必须把手伸到厨房柜台上的所有东西后面才能拔掉这些电器的插头，而拔掉它们的电源线要容易得多？

不太确定乔，但也许这与计划报废有关……；）https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Planned_obsolescent

他们会迷路的。制造商将开始在没有实际插头的情况下发送电线，就像他们现在对电子产品所做的那样，所以你会玩捉迷藏的游戏，找到电线和一块连接到插座的砖块。

Antares FWIW 我认为你有一个好主意，乔。是的，它有与之相关的不便，但当前的实施也有不便。你付你的钱，你做你的选择。如果你有选择的话。

额外的插头和插座的额外成本不可忽略。 OTOH，我喜欢能够购买或制作非常短或超长的电源线。

https://www.sunbeam.ca/en_CA/kitchen-appliances/sunbeam-1.7l-detachable-cord-electric-kettle-white/BVSBKT31CD-033.html#

欧洲的大多数电器都使用 IEC C7 电缆，并且更换电缆非常便宜。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
